Entertainment

  • football-clistars992 - Get live scores, fixtures, standings of almost every football competition/league.
  • pockytstars432 - Read, Manage, and Automate your Pocket collection.
  • newsboatstars1.6k - An extendable RSS feed reader for text terminals.

Music

  • cmusstars4.2k - Small, fast and powerful console music player.
  • Instant-Music-Downloaderstars1.3k - Instant music downloader.
  • itunes-remotestars409 - Control iTunes via CLI.
  • pianobar - Pandora client.
  • somafm-clistars85 - Listen to SomaFM in your terminal.
  • nehmstars83 - Download tracks from SoundCloud.
  • mpdstars1.3k - Music Player Daemon.
  • ncmpcppstars1.2k - mpd client.
  • moc - Console audio player for Linux/UNIX.
  • musikcubestars2.4k - Cross-platform, terminal-based music player, audio engine, metadata indexer, and server.
  • beetsstars10.1k - Music library manager and tagger.
  • playxstars195 - Stream songs/playlists from various sources.
  • spotify-tuistars8.4k - Spotify client.
  • swaglyrics-for-spotifystars242 - Spotify lyrics.

Social Media

  • facebook-clistars353 - Facebook command line interface.
  • TTYtterstars320 - Twitter client.
  • Rainbowstreamstars3.3k - A smart and nice Twitter client on the terminal.
  • tuir - Reddit TUI.
  • WeeChat - Fast, light and extensible chat client.
  • irssistars2.3k - IRC chat client.
  • kircstars423 - Tiny IRC client.

Video

  • youtube-dlstars94.5k - Download videos from YouTube.com and many other video sites.

  • mps-youtubestars6.7k - Youtube player.
  • mpv - Superior video player.
  • editlystars2.8k - Declarative video editing.

Movies

  • moviemonstars167 - Everything about your movies.

Games

  • Dwarf Fortress - Roguelike construction and management simulation.

Books

  • eprstars681 - epub reader.

  • SpeedReadstars47 - Spritz-alike speedreader.

Development

  • bcalstars335 - Byte CALculator for storage conversions and calculations.
  • cgasmstars325 - Gives x86 assembly documentation.
  • legitstars518 - Generate Open Source licences as files or file headers.
  • mklicensestars142 - Create a custom LICENSE file painlessly with customized info.
  • reboundstars3.5k - Fetch Stack Overflow results in your terminal when you get a compiler error.
  • bitwisestars394 - Base conversion and bit manipulator in ncurses.
  • foystars176 - Lightweight general purpose task runner/build tool.
  • juststars2.8k - Modern make-like command runner.
  • grexstars3.7k - Generate regular expressions from user-provided test cases.

Text Editors

  • emacsstars3k - An extensible, customizable, free/libre text editor — and more.
  • vimstars23.7k - Vim - the ubiquitous text editor.
  • neovimstars43.6k - Vim fork focused on extensibility and usability.
  • kakounestars7k - Modal editor inspired by vim.
  • microstars16.8k - A simple and intuitive editor.

Web Development

  • caniuse-cmdstars1.5k - Search caniuse.com about browser support of feature.

  • pageres-clistars1.4k - Capture website screenshots.
  • strip-css-comments-clistars29 - Strip comments from CSS.
  • viewport-list-clistars46 - Return a list of devices and their viewports.
  • surge - Deploy a directory to the web.
  • acmetoolstars1.8k - An automatic certificate acquisition tool for ACME (Let's Encrypt).
  • loadteststars2.1k - Runs a load test on the selected URL. Easy to extend minimally for your own ends.
  • wp-clistars4.4k - Manage WordPress installations, update plugins, set up multisite installs and much more.
  • diff2html-clistars294 - Parse git diffs as JSON and generate pretty HTML.
  • HTTPiestars50.7k - A user-friendly HTTP client.
  • servestars6.8k - Easy to use static file server with features like https, CORS and GZIP compression.
  • add-gitignorestars482 - Interactively generate a .gitignore for your project based on your needs.
  • Dischargestars486 - Deploy static websites to Amazon S3.
  • reachablestars12 - Check if a domain is up.
  • simplehttpstars27 - Easily serve a local directory over http.
  • shell2httpstars755 - Execute shell commands via HTTP server.
  • HTTP Promptstars8.2k - Interactive HTTP client featuring autocomplete and syntax highlighting.
  • ipfs-deploystars772 - Deploy static websites to IPFSstars19.3k.

  • mobicon-clistars95 - Mobile app icon generator.
  • mobisplash-clistars58 - Mobile app splash screen generator.

  • flogstars558 - A fake log generator for log formats such as apache-common, apache error and RFC3164 syslog.

Release

  • release-itstars4.1k - Automate releases for Git repositories and/or npm packages. Changelog generation, GitHub/GitLab releases, etc.

  • releasestars3.3k - Generate changelogs with a single command.

  • ideastars172 - A lightweight tool for keeping ideas in a safe place quick and easy.

Utilities

macOS

  • open-pip-clistars185 - Watch videos in picture-in-picture player.
  • app-path-clistars38 - Get the path to an app.

Terminal Sharing Utilities

  • gottystars15.3k - Share your terminal as a web application.
  • localtunnelstars11.9k - Expose your localhost to the world for easy testing and sharing.
  • mosh - Remote SSH client that allows roaming with intermittent connectivity.
  • ngrok - Secure introspectable tunnels to localhost.
  • serveo - Expose local servers to the internet using only a SSH client.
  • seashells.io - Pipe output to the web.
  • teleconsole - Share your UNIX terminal.
  • tmate - Instant terminal (tmux) sharing.

  • get-port-clistars105 - Get an available port.

Theming and Customization

  • visidatastars3.8k - Spreadsheet multitool for data discovery and arrangement.

  • jqstars19.4k - JSON processor.

  • jpstars30 - JSON parser.

Columns

Text

  • figlet - Creates large text out of ASCII characters.

File Managers

  • rangerstars9.7k - A console file manager with VI key bindings.

Deleting, Copying, and Renaming

  • trash-clistars893 - Move files and directories to the trash.

Files

Directory Navigation

  • autojumpstars12.6k - A cd command that learns - easily navigate directories from the command line.
  • fasdstars5.4k - Command-line productivity booster, offers quick access to files and directories, inspired by autojump, z and v.
  • pmstars144 - The easy way to switch to your projects on the shell.
  • zstars13.1k - z is the new j, yo.
  • PathPickerstars4.6k - After parsing the output from a command, PathPicker presents you with a nice UI to select which files you're interested in.
  • fzstars368 - Seamless fuzzy tab completion for z.
  • gotostars705 - Directory aliases for the shell with autocomplete.
  • z.luastars2k - cd command that learns your habits.
  • zoxidestars2.4k - Fast directory jumper in Rust.

Search

  • happyfinderstars316 - (another) Fuzzy file finder for the command line.
  • find-up-clistars24 - Find a file by walking up parent directories.
  • ripgrepstars25k - A line-oriented search tool that recursively searches your current directory for a regex pattern.
  • fzfstars36.6k - A general purpose command-line fuzzy finder, can be used with any list: files/directories, command history, processes, hostnames, bookmarks, git commits, etc.
  • fselectstars2.9k - Find files with SQL-like queries.
  • fdstars17.2k - A simple, fast and user-friendly alternative to find.
  • brootstars5.2k - Fuzzy finder similar to fzf, but with space usage visualization.
  • rarestars85 - Real-time regex aggregation and analysis.

Version Control

  • SnowFSstars619 - A fast, scalable version control system for binaries.

  • dev-timestars176 - Get the current local time of a GitHub user.
  • git-labelmakerstars537 - Edit GitHub labels from the command line.
  • tigstars10k - Text-mode interface for Git.

  • git-standupstars6.9k - Recall what you did on the last working day.
  • git-secretstars2.4k - Store your private data inside a git repository.
  • gitlab-clistars226 - gitlab cli for creating merge request from the command line.
  • git-extrasstars14.8k - Little git extras like git-ignore, git-setup, git-changelog, git-release, git-effort and more.

  • readme-md-generatorstars8.5k - Generate README.md files interactively.
  • semantic-git-commit-clistars117 - Ensure semantic commits messages.
  • import-github-labels-clistars15 - Sync labels between Github repos.

Images

Gif Creation

  • gifgenstars403 - Simple high quality GIF encoding.

Screensavers

Just for Fun

  • cowsaystars182 - A configurable talking cow (and other animals).

Other

  • birthdaystars52 - Know when a friend's birthday is coming.
  • detect-indent-clistars18 - Detect the indentation of code.
  • fullname-clistars15 - Get the fullname of the current user.
  • gzip-size-clistars161 - Get the gzipped size of a file or stdin.
  • HASHA -clistars60 - Hashing made simple. Get the hash of text or stdin.

  • open-shortcut-clistars12 - Open the URL from a web shortcut file in the browser.

  • to-double-quotesstars12 - Convert matching single-quotes to double-quotes: I 'love' unicorns => I "love" unicorns.

  • gdb-dashboardstars7.4k - Modular visual interface for GDB in Python.

  • caloriesstars71 - Calories and weight tracker.
  • trinostars120 - Trino CLI allows a quick and easy translation of words and phrases entered in the command line.
  • alexstars4k - This enhances texts with checking for insensitive, inconsiderate writing by catching many possible offences.
  • xiringuitostars979 - A "poor man's VPN". An SSH-based "VPN" that's easy to install, but with slower performance than a real VPN.
  • nasa-clistars45 - Download NASA Picture of the Day from your terminal.
  • googlrstars30 - Search Google from the command line.
  • Qalculatestars425 - Calculate non-trival math expressions. Unit conversions, symbolic calculations and more.

Emoji

  • gitmoji-changelogstars261 - Generate gitmoji changelogs.
